title: Operational bulletins 2007 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational bulletins 2007
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 043 – December 19, 2007 (Expired) End of interim measure on adoption
- OB 037 – September 7, 2007 Assessing excessive demand on social services for business class applicants
- OB 035 – July 23, 2007 Expansion of the Off-Campus Work Permit Program to include private institutions as a pilot project
- OB 032 – July 6, 2007 (Expired) Remission of Citizenship Fees
- OB 031 – May 28, 2007 (Expired) Handling Special Cases of Certain People Living in Canada Without Status
- OB 030 – May 28, 2007 (Expired) Interim Instructions on Handling Cases on Hold Pending the Taylor Appeal
- OB 028 – April 19, 2007 The following provides guidance on how to proceed in cases for landing citizens of India who are unable to obtain a valid passport and/or police certificates
- OB 025 – January 3, 2007 (Expired) Instructions to CIC officers concerning the validity period of Live-in Caregiver work permits as well as family members of Live-in Caregivers

## All operational bulletins (by year)
